unavailable_text: 2004-05-19	WORK SEARCH REVIEW ON MAY-19-2004 AS TO RESPONDENT ERNESTO ESAU MURILLO NO APPEARANCE. COURT ORDERS WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT (BENCH WARRANT) ISSUED FROM HEARING THIS DATE WITH CASH ONLY BAIL OF $1,500.00 AND RESTRICTED RETURN TO ANY FRIDAY MORNING @ 9:00 AM.
